title: Bachelor of Respiratory Technology
content: The Bachelor of Respiratory Technology programme aims to provide comprehensive academic and clinical training to develop competent, compassionate, and patient-centered Respiratory Therapists. The programme prepares graduates to function as skilled healthcare professionals with strong critical-thinking abilities in the assessment, treatment, and care of patients with cardiopulmonary disorders. Upon completion of the programme, graduates will be proficient in performing respiratory care procedures, operating and managing respiratory and life-support equipment, and assisting in diagnostic and therapeutic interventions. They will be able to ensure patient safety, infection control, and quality assurance, manage emergency and critical care situations, and deliver ethical, empathetic, and professional patient care as effective members of the healthcare team. Class XII or equivalent exam with minimum 50% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB). The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer) 01 Clinical Competence: Apply foundational biomedical and respiratory science knowledge to assess, plan, and deliver safe and effective respiratory care across diverse clinical settings. 02 Diagnostic & Therapeutic Skills: Perform and interpret respiratory diagnostic procedures and deliver therapeutic interventions, including oxygen therapy, aerosol therapy, and mechanical ventilation. 03 Critical Care & Emergency Management: Demonstrate competency in managing critically ill patients in emergency, trauma, neonatal, pediatric, and adult intensive care units. 04 Equipment Handling & Technology Use: Operate, monitor, troubleshoot, and maintain respiratory and life-support equipment in accordance with established standards and safety protocols. 05 Patient-Centered & Ethical Practice: Provide compassionate, ethical, and culturally sensitive patient care while adhering to professional standards, legal responsibilities, and scope of practice. 06 Infection Control & Patient Safety: Implement infection prevention, quality assurance, and patient safety measures to minimize risks and enhance healthcare outcomes. 07 Interdisciplinary Teamwork & Communication: Communicate effectively and collaborate with physicians, nurses, and allied healthcare professionals as an integral member of the healthcare team. 08 Research, Evidence-Based Practice & Lifelong: Learning Apply research principles and evidence-based practices to improve respiratory care and engage in continuous professional development. 09 Professionalism & Healthcare Leadership: Demonstrate professionalism, accountability, and leadership skills in healthcare delivery, administration, and community respiratory health promotion. 01 Professional Competence: Graduates will establish successful careers as competent Respiratory Therapists by applying scientific knowledge, clinical skills, and professional judgment in diverse healthcare settings. 02 Quality Patient Care & Ethics: Graduates will deliver safe, ethical, and patient-centered respiratory care while adhering to professional standards, legal requirements, and healthcare regulations. 03 Lifelong Learning & Advancement: Graduates will engage in continuous professional development, higher education, research, and adoption of emerging technologies in respiratory care. 04 Leadership & Social Responsibility: Graduates will demonstrate leadership, teamwork, and effective communication skills, contributing to healthcare systems, community respiratory health, and public awareness initiatives. The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer)
